description: Color event photograph. On a stage with a dark red curtain backdrop and a faintly visible DHS/USCIS seal flag at left, a woman in a dark blazer with glasses and a face mask (USCIS Deputy Director Jennifer Higgins) hands a certificate of naturalization to a new citizen, a Black U.S. Marine in dress blues seen from behind. Two masked officials (a man in a gray suit and a woman in gray) stand at left, and a wooden lectern with microphones is at right. All present wear COVID-era masks. It is a natural-light color event photograph with no overlaid slogan text or graphic design and no visible watermark. Per the tweet, this is the Presidents Day naturalization ceremony at George Washington's Mount Vernon.
